'''竏單h-r-t''' ('''kadharat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yed|yed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-r-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yed|yed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏單h-r-t
|-
! Lemma
| kadharat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidharat|thidharat]] || [[word:jidharat|jidharat]] || [[word:shidharat|shidharat]] || [[word:kidharat|kidharat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudharat|thuthudharat]] || [[word:jujudharat|jujudharat]] || [[word:shushudharat|shushudharat]] || [[word:kukudharat|kukudharat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudharat|thudharat]] || [[word:judharat|judharat]] || [[word:shudharat|shudharat]] || [[word:kudharat|kudharat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudharat|thudharat]] || [[word:judharat|judharat]] || [[word:shudharat|shudharat]] || [[word:kudharat|kudharat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedharat|thedharat]] || [[word:jedharat|jedharat]] || [[word:shedharat|shedharat]] || [[word:kedharat|kedharat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodharat|thothodharat]] || [[word:jojodharat|jojodharat]] || [[word:shoshodharat|shoshodharat]] || [[word:kokodharat|kokodharat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodharat|thodharat]] || [[word:jodharat|jodharat]] || [[word:shodharat|shodharat]] || [[word:kodharat|kodharat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodharat|thodharat]] || [[word:jodharat|jodharat]] || [[word:shodharat|shodharat]] || [[word:kodharat|kodharat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dharat|dharat]] || [[word:dharat|dharat]] || [[word:dharat|dharat]] || [[word:dharat|dharat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dharat|dharat]] || [[word:dharat|dharat]] || [[word:dharat|dharat]] || [[word:dharat|dharat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dharat|dharat]] || [[word:dharat|dharat]] || [[word:dharat|dharat]] || [[word:dharat|dharat]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dharat|dharat]] || [[word:dharat|dharat]] || [[word:dharat|dharat]] || [[word:dharat|dharat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thﾃｦdharat|thﾃｦdharat]] || [[word:jﾃｦdharat|jﾃｦdharat]] || [[word:shﾃｦdharat|shﾃｦdharat]] || [[word:kﾃｦdharat|kﾃｦdharat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadharat|thathadharat]] || [[word:jajadharat|jajadharat]] || [[word:shashadharat|shashadharat]] || [[word:kakadharat|kakadharat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadharat|thadharat]] || [[word:jadharat|jadharat]] || [[word:shadharat|shadharat]] || [[word:kadharat|kadharat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadharat|thadharat]] || [[word:jadharat|jadharat]] || [[word:shadharat|shadharat]] || [[word:kadharat|kadharat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadharat|shadharat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadharat|goshadharat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadharat|gokishadharat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadharatnﾃｼ|shadharatnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadharatnknﾃｼ|goshadharatnknﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadharatnﾃｼ|gokishadharatnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadharatshﾃｫ|shadharatshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadharatnkshﾃｫ|goshadharatnkshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadharatshﾃｫ|gokishadharatshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadharatro|shadharatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadharatnkro|goshadharatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadharatro|gokishadharatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadharatmu|shadharatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadharatnkmu|goshadharatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadharatmu|gokishadharatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadharatsher|shadharatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadharatnksher|goshadharatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadharatsher|gokishadharatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadharatng|shadharatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadharatnkng|goshadharatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadharatng|gokishadharatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadharatya|shadharatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadharatnkya|goshadharatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadharatya|gokishadharatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadharatyam|shadharatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadharatnkyam|goshadharatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadharatyam|gokishadharatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadharatnﾃｼshﾃｫ|shadharatnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadharatnknﾃｼshﾃｫ|goshadharatnknﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadharatnﾃｼshﾃｫ|gokishadharatnﾃｼshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadharatnﾃｼro|shadharatnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadharatnknﾃｼro|goshadharatnknﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadharatnﾃｼro|gokishadharatnﾃｼro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadharatnﾃｼmu|shadharatnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadharatnknﾃｼmu|goshadharatnknﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadharatnﾃｼmu|gokishadharatnﾃｼmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadharatshﾃｫnﾃｼ|shadharatshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadharatnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ|goshadharatnkshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadharatshﾃｫnﾃｼ|gokishadharatshﾃｫnﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadharatshﾃｫro|shadharatshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadharatnkshﾃｫro|goshadharatnkshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadharatshﾃｫro|gokishadharatshﾃｫro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadharatshﾃｫmu|shadharatshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadharatnkshﾃｫmu|goshadharatnkshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadharatshﾃｫmu|gokishadharatshﾃｫmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadharatronﾃｼ|shadharatronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadharatnkronﾃｼ|goshadharatnkronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadharatronﾃｼ|gokishadharatronﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadharatroshﾃｫ|shadharatroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadharatnkroshﾃｫ|goshadharatnkroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadharatroshﾃｫ|gokishadharatroshﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadharatromu|shadharatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadharatnkromu|goshadharatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadharatromu|gokishadharatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadharatmunﾃｼ|shadharatmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadharatnkmunﾃｼ|goshadharatnkmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadharatmunﾃｼ|gokishadharatmunﾃｼ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadharatmushﾃｫ|shadharatmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadharatnkmushﾃｫ|goshadharatnkmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadharatmushﾃｫ|gokishadharatmushﾃｫ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadharatmuro|shadharatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadharatnkmuro|goshadharatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadharatmuro|gokishadharatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
